title: Unite secures inflation beating pay rise for ICTS screeners at Glasgow airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Unite secures inflation beating pay rise for ICTS screeners at Glasgow airport. Trade union delivers significant wage rises over recent years. Unite has secured an inflation beating pay rise for ICTS hold baggage...
